_comment: HAND-AUTHORED answer key for the nist_ftc_07 drawing-read eval. Derived ONLY from the callouts DRAWN on the NIST PMI FTC-07 drawing (read from 'View B', PDF page 1, the clearest dimensioned isometric), tile-cropped from a 500-DPI render into 4 overlapping quadrants and transcribed by eye. NOT from ground_truth/, the .stp, meta.json or topology.json. Values AS DRAWN in DECIMAL INCHES (units=in, NOTES block states 'UNITS: INCHES'), pre-normalization (downstream normalize_to_mm scales x25.4). Each diameter recorded ONCE on its feature. NOTE: the primary task drawing.png is View A (page 0); this key is authored from View B because every toleranced diameter is legible there. The two views show the same part, so the callout set is shared. Counterbore on the Ø.281 pattern captured as type=counterbore with both bore and c'bore diameters. Auditable: re-render page 1 @500 DPI, tile-crop, callouts reappear at the cited provenance.

dimensions.provenance: TL quadrant, near 4X Ø.281, counterbore depth callout 'v.30 +/-.02'

features.provenance: TL quadrant, top, '4X Ø.281 +.006/-.001' through, counterbored Ø.438 +.001/-.010 deep .30
TL quadrant, the counterbore diameter of the 4X Ø.281 pattern: 'Ø.438 +.001/-.010'
BR quadrant, right face, '3X Ø.875 +/-.020 (ST)' and '3X Ø.875 +/-.010'

gdt_frames.provenance: TL quadrant, near 4X Ø.281, frame pos Ø.06(M) | E | B | C
TL quadrant, near 4X Ø.281, frame pos Ø.02(M) | E | B | C
TL/TR quadrants, '4 COPLANAR SURFACES', frame profile .04 | A | B | C
TL/TR quadrants, '4 COPLANAR SURFACES', frame profile .01 | A
BL quadrant, near 2X Ø.594, frame pos Ø.040(M) | A | B | C, with Ø.045 MAX
BL/BR quadrants, near 4X Ø.173, frame pos Ø.060 | A | B | C
BL/BR quadrants, near 4X Ø.173, frame pos .015 | A
BR quadrant, near 3X Ø.875, frame pos Ø.050(S) | A | B | C
